# Transaction Feature Shadow Spec

> Transaction Lifecycle Management - Core operational feature for financial activities

**Status:** Planned
**Generated by:** spec-lead + @pseudo-worker

---

```sudolang
import("specs/ARCHITECTURE.md")
import("specs/DB_DESIGN.md")
import("specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md")
import("specs/FEATURES.md")
import("specs/DEPENDENCIES.md")
```

---

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Package-by-Feature Structure
// src/commonMain/kotlin/com/budgetcalendar/features/transactions/
// ├── data/
// │   ├── local/           # SQLDelight queries
// │   ├── repository/     # TransactionRepositoryImpl
// │   └── mapper/          # TransactionMapper
// ├── domain/
// │   ├── model/           # Transaction, TransactionState, TransactionType
// │   ├── repository/     # ITransactionRepository
// │   └── usecase/         # CreateTransaction, ConfirmTransaction, etc.
// └── presentation/
//     ├── TransactionViewModel.kt
//     └── TransactionUiState.kt
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// Domain Models
interface Transaction {
  id: Long;
  accountId: Long;
  destinationAccountId: Long?;  // For TRANSFER type
  amount: Long;                  // In cents (positive)
  date: Long;                    // Unix timestamp ms
  type: TransactionType;
  status: TransactionStatus;
  description: String?;
  category: String?;
  linkedTransactionId: Long?;   // Links paired transfer transactions
  isSandbox: Boolean;
  createdAt: Long;
  updatedAt: Long;
}

enum TransactionType {
  INCOME = "income"
  EXPENSE = "expense"
  TRANSFER = "transfer"
}

enum TransactionStatus {
  PENDING = "pending"      // Scheduled, reserves funds
  CONFIRMED = "confirmed" // Actually occurred
  OVERDUE = "overdue"     // Passed scheduled date, not confirmed
  CANCELLED = "cancelled" // Cancelled, funds released
}

interface CreateTransactionRequest {
  accountId: Long;
  destinationAccountId: Long?;
  amount: Long;
  date: Long;
  type: TransactionType;
  status: TransactionStatus;
  description: String?;
  category: String?;
}

interface UpdateTransactionStatusRequest {
  status: TransactionStatus;
}

// UI State Models
interface TransactionUiState {
  transactions: List<Transaction>;
  selectedTransaction: Transaction?;
  isLoading: Boolean;
  error: String?;
  selectedDateFilter: DateRange?;
  typeFilter: TransactionType?;
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
Constraint: Transaction amount must be > 0; type determines direction (income adds, expense subtracts)
Constraint: Transaction date is required
Constraint: Transaction type must be one of: INCOME, EXPENSE, TRANSFER
Constraint: Transaction status lifecycle: PENDING -> OVERDUE -> CONFIRMED or CANCELLED
Constraint: Pending transactions automatically transition to OVERDUE when current_date > transaction_date + 1 day
Constraint: MarkOverdueTransactionsUseCase MUST be called at app initialization and on every app foreground resume
Constraint: The overdue transition is idempotent — calling it multiple times produces the same result
Constraint: Cancelled transactions do not affect balance calculations
Constraint: Transfer creates two linked transactions: debit from source, credit to destination
Constraint: Linked transactions (transfers) are deleted together
Constraint: Category required for INCOME and EXPENSE
Constraint: Description optional, max 200 characters
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Create Transaction Flow
User Input |> validateTransactionInput |> CreateTransactionUseCase.execute()
  |> If (type == TRANSFER) |> CreateLinkedTransactions
  |> TransactionRepository.insert()
  |> If (status == CONFIRMED) |> AccountRepository.adjustBalance()
  |> If (isInSpendingPool and status != CANCELLED) |> UpdateSafeToSpend
  |> Return Transaction
  |> Update TransactionUiState

// Confirm Transaction Flow
User Confirm |> UpdateTransactionStatusUseCase.execute(id)
  |> AccountRepository.adjustBalance()
  |> RecalculateSafeToSpend
  |> Return Updated Transaction

// Cancel Transaction Flow
User Cancel |> CancelTransactionUseCase.execute(id)
  |> TransactionRepository.updateStatus(CANCELLED)
  |> RestoreReservedAmount
  |> RecalculateSafeToSpend
  |> Return Updated Transaction

// Auto-Overdue Transition — triggered at TWO points:
// 1. App initialization (catches transactions that went overdue while app was closed)
// 2. App foreground resume (catches transitions that occur while app is backgrounded)
//
// Both trigger: MarkOverdueTransactionsUseCase.execute(nowMillis)
//   |> TransactionRepository.getPendingTransactions()
//   |> Filter: nowMillis > transaction.date + MILLIS_IN_DAY
//   |> ForEach |> TransactionRepository.updateStatus(id, OVERDUE)
//   |> Return count of updated transactions
//
// This operation is idempotent — safe to call multiple times.
// Already-OVERDUE transactions are excluded by the getPendingTransactions query.
```

---

## Function Signatures

```sudolang
fn CreateTransaction(ctx: Context, req: CreateTransactionRequest): Result<Transaction>
fn GetTransactions(ctx: Context, filter: TransactionFilter): Flow<List<Transaction>>
fn GetTransactionById(ctx: Context, id: Long): Result<Transaction>
fn GetTransactionsByDateRange(ctx: Context, startDate: Long, endDate: Long): Flow<List<Transaction>>
fn GetTransactionsByDate(ctx: Context, date: Long): Flow<List<Transaction>>
fn GetPendingTransactions(ctx: Context): Flow<List<Transaction>>
fn GetOverdueTransactions(ctx: Context): Flow<List<Transaction>>
fn UpdateTransactionStatus(ctx: Context, id: Long, req: UpdateTransactionStatusRequest): Result<Transaction>
fn MarkOverdueTransactions(ctx: Context, nowMillis: Long): Int  // Returns count of newly marked transactions
fn DeleteTransaction(ctx: Context, id: Long): Result<void>
fn DeleteLinkedTransaction(ctx: Context, linkedId: Long): Result<void>
```

## UI Components

```sudolang
// TransactionListItem Props
interface TransactionListItemProps {
  transaction: Transaction;
  onTap: () -> Unit;
  onLongPress: () -> Unit?;
}

// TransactionForm Props
interface TransactionFormProps {
  initialData: Transaction?;
  accounts: List<Account>;
  onSave: (CreateTransactionRequest) -> Unit;
  onCancel: () -> Unit;
  onDelete: (Transaction) -> Unit?;
}

// Transaction States Display
// - Default: Standard display
// - Pending: Amber background (#FFF8E1), clock icon
// - Overdue: Red background (#FFEBEE), warning icon
// - Confirmed: Standard display, no special styling
```

---

## Database Schema

```sudolang
table transactions {
  id: Long PK AUTOINCREMENT
  account_id: Long NOT NULL REFERENCES accounts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  destination_account_id: Long REFERENCES accounts(id)
  amount: Integer NOT NULL
  date: Integer NOT NULL
  type: Text NOT NULL CHECK(type IN ('income','expense','transfer'))
  status: Text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK(status IN ('pending','confirmed','overdue','cancelled'))
  description: Text
  category: Text
  linked_transaction_id: Long REFERENCES transactions(id)
  is_sandbox: Integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
  created_at: Integer NOT NULL
  updated_at: Integer NOT NULL
}

index idx_transactions_account ON transactions(account_id)
index idx_transactions_date ON transactions(date)
index idx_transactions_status ON transactions(status)
index idx_transactions_sandbox ON transactions(is_sandbox)
index idx_transactions_date_type ON transactions(date, type)
```

---

## SQLDelight Queries

```sudolang
// getTransactionsByAccount :many
SELECT * FROM transactions 
WHERE account_id = :account_id 
ORDER BY date DESC;

// getTransactionsByDateRange :many
SELECT * FROM transactions 
WHERE date BETWEEN :startDate AND :endDate
ORDER BY date ASC;

// getTransactionsByDate :many
SELECT * FROM transactions 
WHERE date = :date
ORDER BY created_at DESC;

// getPendingTransactions :many
SELECT * FROM transactions 
WHERE status = 'pending' AND is_sandbox = 0
ORDER BY date ASC;

// getOverdueTransactions :many
SELECT * FROM transactions 
WHERE status = 'overdue' AND is_sandbox = 0
ORDER BY date ASC;

// getConfirmedTransactions :many
SELECT * FROM transactions 
WHERE status = 'confirmed' AND is_sandbox = 0
ORDER BY date DESC;

// insertTransaction :one
INSERT INTO transactions (account_id, destination_account_id, amount, date, type, status, description, category, is_sandbox, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (:account_id, :destination_account_id, :amount, :date, :type, :status, :description, :category, :is_sandbox, :created_at, :updated_at)
RETURNING *;

// updateTransactionStatus :one
UPDATE transactions 
SET status = :status, updated_at = :updated_at
WHERE id = :id
RETURNING *;

// deleteTransaction :exec
DELETE FROM transactions WHERE id = :id;
```

## Dependencies

```sudolang
// External Dependencies
Dependency: sqldelight (2.0.1) - Database
Dependency: koin (3.5.3) - DI
Dependency: kotlinx-coroutines (1.7.3) - Async
Dependency: kotlinx-datetime (0.5.0) - Date handling

// Internal Dependencies
Dependency: core/database - SQLDelight queries
Dependency: features/accounts - Account ID foreign key, isInSpendingPool check
Dependency: features/budget - Safe to Spend calculation
Dependency: features/sandbox - isSandbox flag
```

---

## Edge Cases

| Case | Condition | Handling |
|------|-----------|----------|
| Auto-overdue transition | current_date > transaction_date + 1 and state == PENDING | Auto-update to OVERDUE via daily job |
| Transfer to same account | source_account == destination_account | Return error: "Cannot transfer to the same account" |
| Insufficient funds | EXPENSE on account with balance < amount | Allow but show warning banner |
| Cancel pending transaction | state == PENDING and user cancels | Update to CANCELLED, restore deducted amount |
| Confirm overdue transaction | state == OVERDUE and user confirms | Update to CONFIRMED |
| Delete recurring transaction | isRecurring == true | Prompt: "Delete this occurrence" or "Delete all" |
| Past date for new income | date < today and type == INCOME | Return error: "Cannot record income in the past" |
| Future date for expense | date > today + 30 days | Return error: "Cannot schedule expenses more than 30 days ahead" |
